parameters.content:
## Model route control

Edit the ordered route list in **Desired Model Routes**, then execute this workflow. Lower priority numbers run first.

Default order: DeepSeek V4 Pro, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Codex Spark, Codex Mini. OpenAI API remains disabled until an operator enables it.

The Brain API owns fallback and cooldown behavior; channel workflows must not implement model-selection branches.
